{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410045719BC004D7EA6DADA22D3"}"},"total":2233},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7521366673526375230","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爆了，爽的很，看到200多章一群销冠啊，老是哄我把前面的重刷，好好好，好的很呐，怀疑作者更新太慢了想留住我们这群读者，哄我们去重刷啊，有这功夫还不快点给我更新，我的妈，这书写的太有水平了，都有点怀疑这是不是烂柿子能写出来的文了哈哈哈（扶额无奈苦笑）很少有迪化文写的如此称我心意了不错不错哈哈哈，强烈推荐，非常之美味，走过路过不要错过啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751208228,"group_id":"7197271483859602447","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2xpI22SBN/+uquhzgwFj9+hqWBA+rJbJaCql3Vn4Kv1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/536f1dabfc104358b61ffed4cc316a0c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878543&x-signature=zBypbISncOpi788mo0G%2Fj1drx60%3D","user_id":"3680808155748340","user_name":"oyyyyyyy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3680808155748340","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197271483859602447","book_info":{"abstract":"无cp+系统+迪化流

洛月见一直认为自己是个平凡又普通的人，还有点社恐+面瘫。这样的人扔进人群中毫不起眼，绝对会被所有人忽视掉。

 离奇死亡后她被迫进入逃生游戏，她有自知之明，知道自己是绝对没有能力在恐怖逃生游戏中复活的。

 就在她纠结到底是要奋力拼一把，还是就此摆烂，突然，她获得了一个完美符合她心意的系统。

 摆烂系统：摆烂死亡，直接复活！
只要宿主在不违规的情况下成功死亡，就可以原地复活，收获1亿现金回到现实世界！

 洛月见邪魅一笑：开摆！

 【恶魔别墅】
洛月见狗狗祟祟的离开房间，欲意作死。
结果，洛月见仿若欧皇附身，随便伸个懒腰，都能避开致命飞箭。
直播间观众震惊：原来是个大佬？！
洛月见：？

 【死亡沙漠】
洛月见潇洒将自己唯一的水资源倒掉。
下一秒，喝了水的队友B口吐白沫倒地不起。
队友感激涕零：谢大佬提醒！
洛月见：？

 【长眠地宫】
遍地是毒虫的密道，洛月见直接明演，直接走了进去。
下一秒，毒虫面对洛月见四散奔逃。
队友and观众高呼：不愧是大佬！
洛月见：？

 面对越来越多的粉丝，以及越来越远的目标。

eply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":37,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16351},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7516784777536979774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书简直太好看了，月月每一次离谱的或者无意间的动作都是下文的线索，根本不尴尬，不合理的行为之中带着合理的解释。
你以为的女主大杀四方，其实她只是混水摸鱼，一心求死；你以为的女主波澜不惊，运筹为幄，实际上她只是面瘫，而且懒得动，所有的巧合铸就了她的运筹为幄。所以玩家：月神太帅了！星际网友：她的这个动作肯定有含义！
你甚至能看到系统反pu 女主，女主怀疑系统又不得不信系统，你要问为什么，那就是因为系统实在是巧舌如簧。一个个精的嘞！","text_exts":[{"e":82,"s":78,"text":"一心求死","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E5%BF%83%E6%B1%82%E6%AD%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774317897DADA22D3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227516784777536979774%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227197271483859602447%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E5%BF%83%E6%B1%82%E6%AD%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750148137,"group_id":"7197271483859602447","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"把好饭都端上来！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N32JXWgMjt4Vfs3JQRh5JPRd4vtAzziL/s1+WB9Okb5B","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/80164101b02041acae1813738d583f55~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882346&x-signature=w%2F4WX8ajtW0pq0Hld5Rk2iNa%2Bw8%3D","user_id":"1781681497324264","user_name":"我要连载文的更新"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1781681497324264","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":9,"fan_ranklist_title":"第五层","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197271483859602447","book_info":{"abstract":"无cp+系统+迪化流
